name: Pumpkin Pie with Gingersnap Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the crust: Pulse gingersnap cookie crumbs in a food processor and transfer to a bowl. Using a fork, mix in powdered sugar, melted butter, and ground cinnamon until combined. Lightly grease a 9-inch pie pan, press the mixture into the bottom, and bake at 325°F for 5 minutes. Let cool for 10 minutes on a rack.
2. To prepare the filling: In a large bowl, whisk eggs lightly. Add pumpkin, brown sugar, granulated sugar, salt, ground ginger, cinnamon, cloves, evaporated milk, and milk. Mix until smooth; do not overbeat.
3. Pour the filling into the prepared crust. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes, or until set. Let cool on a rack before refrigerating. Allow to chill for at least one hour before serving. Serve with whipped cream if desired. (Nutritional data per serving: Calories 260, Protein 4g, Fat 13g, Carbohydrates 33g, Sodium 220mg, Saturated fat 7g, Monounsaturated fat 5g, Polyunsaturated fat 1g, Cholesterol 74mg.)
